# VerdictLens

version: 1
site: http://localhost:3000/
name: VerdictLens
description: Bilingual directory of AI models, skills, and use-case guides with editorial scoring, official links, and public JSON data.
last_updated: 2026-04-08T06:40:00.000Z
languages: en, zh-TW
formats: text/html, application/json

[overview]
VerdictLens helps humans and machines compare AI models, supporting tools, and workflow patterns.
Each entity has a stable slug, a bilingual HTML page, an official link, and structured JSON coverage in the public data endpoints.

[entity_types]
- model | provider, official_url, description, modalities, context_window, pricing, scores, strengths, caveats, best_use_cases, updated_at
- skill | category, official_url, source_label, supported_providers, install_difficulty, scores, strengths, caveats, best_use_cases, updated_at
- use_case | title, strapline, summary, evaluation_lens, recommended_models, recommended_skills, updated_at

[important_paths]
- landing | http://localhost:3000/
- english_home | http://localhost:3000/en
- traditional_chinese_home | http://localhost:3000/zh-TW
- models_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/models
- models_index_zh | http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models
- skills_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/skills
- skills_index_zh | http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills
- use_cases_index_en | http://localhost:3000/en/use-cases
- use_cases_index_zh | http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/use-cases
- compare_en | http://localhost:3000/en/compare
- compare_zh | http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/compare

[url_patterns]
- model_pages | /{locale}/models/{slug}
- skill_pages | /{locale}/skills/{slug}
- use_case_pages | /{locale}/use-cases/{slug}
- supported_locales | en, zh-TW

[json_endpoints]
- models | http://localhost:3000/data/models.json | shape: { updatedAt, count, items[] }
- skills | http://localhost:3000/data/skills.json | shape: { updatedAt, count, items[] }
- catalog | http://localhost:3000/data/catalog.json | shape: { updatedAt, models[], skills[], useCases[] }

[entities.models]
- gpt-5-4-pro | GPT-5.4 Pro | provider=OpenAI | official=https://openai.com/api/ | best_use_cases=coding,research,agent-automation | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/gpt-5-4-pro | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/gpt-5-4-pro
- gpt-5-mini | GPT-5 Mini | provider=OpenAI | official=https://openai.com/api/ | best_use_cases=agent-automation,research | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/gpt-5-mini | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/gpt-5-mini
- claude-3-7-sonnet | Claude 3.7 Sonnet | provider=Anthropic | official=https://www.anthropic.com/claude | best_use_cases=coding,research | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/claude-3-7-sonnet | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/claude-3-7-sonnet

- gemini-2-5-pro | Gemini 2.5 Pro | provider=Google | official=https://ai.google.dev/gemini-api | best_use_cases=research,agent-automation | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/gemini-2-5-pro | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/gemini-2-5-pro

- deepseek-r1 | DeepSeek R1 | provider=DeepSeek | official=https://www.deepseek.com/ | best_use_cases=coding,research | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/deepseek-r1 | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/deepseek-r1
- llama-4-maverick | Llama 4 Maverick | provider=Meta | official=https://ai.meta.com/llama/ | best_use_cases=agent-automation,research | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/llama-4-maverick | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/llama-4-maverick
- qwen-3-max | Qwen 3 Max | provider=Alibaba Cloud | official=https://www.alibabacloud.com/product/model-studio | best_use_cases=research,agent-automation | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/qwen-3-max | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/qwen-3-max
- mistral-large-2 | Mistral Large 2 | provider=Mistral | official=https://mistral.ai/products/la-plateforme | best_use_cases=research,coding | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/mistral-large-2 | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/mistral-large-2
- command-a | Command A | provider=Cohere | official=https://cohere.com/ | best_use_cases=research,agent-automation | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/command-a | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/command-a
- perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro | Sonar Reasoning Pro | provider=Perplexity | official=https://www.perplexity.ai/hub/blog/sonar | best_use_cases=research | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/models/perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/models/perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro

[entities.skills]
- codex-cli | Codex CLI | category=Coding agent | source=GitHub | providers=OpenAI | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/codex-cli | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/codex-cli
- claude-code | Claude Code | category=Coding agent | source=Docs | providers=Anthropic | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/claude-code | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/claude-code
- langgraph | LangGraph | category=Agent orchestration | source=Docs | providers=OpenAI,Anthropic,Google,Meta | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/langgraph | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/langgraph
- n8n | n8n | category=Automation | source=Website | providers=OpenAI,Anthropic,Google,Cohere | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/n8n | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/n8n
- playwright | Playwright | category=Browser automation | source=Docs | providers=Any | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/playwright | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/playwright
- openai-whisper | OpenAI Whisper | category=Speech to text | source=GitHub | providers=OpenAI,Local | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/openai-whisper | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/openai-whisper
- 1password-cli | 1Password CLI | category=Secrets | source=Docs | providers=Any | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/1password-cli | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/1password-cli

- serpapi | SerpApi | category=Research search | source=Website | providers=Any | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/serpapi | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/serpapi

- obsidian-memory-vault | Obsidian Memory Vault | category=Knowledge memory | source=Website | providers=Any | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/obsidian-memory-vault | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/obsidian-memory-vault
- zapier-ai-actions | Zapier AI Actions | category=Automation | source=Website | providers=OpenAI,Anthropic,Google,Any | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/zapier-ai-actions | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/zapier-ai-actions
- e2b-sandbox | E2B Sandbox | category=Execution runtime | source=Website | providers=Any | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/skills/e2b-sandbox | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/skills/e2b-sandbox

[entities.use_cases]
- coding | Coding copilots & repo execution | recommended_models=gpt-5-4-pro,claude-3-7-sonnet,deepseek-r1 | recommended_skills=codex-cli,claude-code,playwright,e2b-sandbox | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/use-cases/coding | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/use-cases/coding
- research | Research synthesis & analyst workflows | recommended_models=gemini-2-5-pro,claude-3-7-sonnet,perplexity-sonar-reasoning-pro | recommended_skills=serpapi,weaviate,openai-whisper,obsidian-memory-vault | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/use-cases/research | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/use-cases/research
- agent-automation | Agent automation & operations | recommended_models=gpt-5-mini,gpt-5-4-pro,gemini-2-5-flash | recommended_skills=langgraph,n8n,1password-cli,mcp-toolbox | page_en=http://localhost:3000/en/use-cases/agent-automation | page_zh=http://localhost:3000/zh-TW/use-cases/agent-automation

[crawl_hints]
- Prefer localized HTML pages for human-readable summaries and editorial context.
- Prefer JSON endpoints for structured ingestion, catalog refreshes, and field-level extraction.
- Scores are editorial guidance, not official vendor benchmark claims.
